positive: A dramatic, atmospheric cyberpunk street scene in Neo-Tokyo. Rain-slicked asphalt reflects massive neon kanji signs and flying vehicles. Focus on high contrast, deep shadows, glowing wires, and gritty industrial details. Cinematic sci-fi illustration, volumetric fog, high saturation.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft lighting, pastoral, watercolor, simple shapes
